message:
Add cookie consent banner and analytics gating

- add cookie consent storage + hook with DNT/GPC defaults

- gate GA4/Plausible scripts and analytics events behind consent

- add cookie settings UI (banner + dialog) and /cookies page

- update footer and privacy policy to link consent controls

files.patch:
